meaning: n.鲍格才家族(意大利一贵族世家)
examples: A new life opening up for me at the Villa Borghese.
Walk to many nearby Rome attractions, including the Villa Borghese Gallery and the Spanish Steps.
It looks as though it were finished, my life at the Villa Borghese. Well, I'll take up these pages and move on. Things will happen elsewhere.
The grounds of Villa Borghese are also where Rome turns its cultural attention to the wider world.
CNN's Hada Messia, Ed Payne and Michael Pearson and journalist Livia Borghese also contributed to this report.
